## Source: amazon-inspector (989b5f62777b6b7fbd236eb28a54b0e42ba48548dc0a49919c5f311c1f1c7072)
The package f0-state-manager was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (843c9d414a45b746177092a8c7119a4a5ea88f852bed2e14884e5adb9fc13b1f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'f0-state-manager' @ 99.13.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
